CustomField.formula:
IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c)), Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c))) , Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c), NOT(ISBLANK( Date_Changed_to_Held_for_Reapproach__c))) , Date_Changed_to_Held_for_Reapproach__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Held_for_Reapproach__c), NOT(ISBLANK( Date_Changed_to_SQL__c))) , Date_Changed_to_SQL__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Held_for_Reapproach__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_SQL__c),NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Disqualified__c))) , Date_Changed_to_Disqualified__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
IF(AND(ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Accepted__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Contacting__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_Held_for_Reapproach__c), ISBLANK(Date_Changed_to_SQL__c),NOT(ISBLANK(Lead_Converted_date__c))) , Lead_Converted_date__c - Date_changed_to_MQL__c,
TODAY () - Date_changed_to_MQL__c))))))
CustomField.label: Days as MQL
